bash -c 
cmake -S . -B build-hip -G Ninja \
  -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx90a \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++ \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo 2>&1 | tail -40

bash -c 
cmake -S /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src \
  -B /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip -G Ninja \
  -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx90a \

  --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test \

ctest --output-on-failure
ctest --test-dir /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip --output-on-failure

bash -c 
cmake -S . -B build-hip -G Ninja \
  -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx90a \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++ \
  -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo 2>&1 && \
cmake --build build-hip --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16 2>&1
bash -c echo "compile recorded"
cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16
bash -c cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip && ./bin/ans_test && ./bin/ans_statistics_test && ./bin/batch_prefix_sum_test && ./bin/float_test
cmake --build projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16
cmake --build D:/Develop/moat/projects/dietgpu/build-hip --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 6
cmake --build D:/Develop/moat/projects/dietgpu/build-hip --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 6

bash -c 
  cd 'D:/Develop/moat/projects/dietgpu/build-hip' &&
  echo '=== ans_test ===' && ./bin/ans_test.exe &&
  echo '=== ans_statistics_test ===' && ./bin/ans_statistics_test.exe &&
  echo '=== batch_prefix_sum_test ===' && ./bin/batch_prefix_sum_test.exe &&
  echo '=== float_test ===' && ./bin/float_test.exe

bash -c 
  set -e
  cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src
  cmake -S . -B build-hip -G Ninja \
    -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES="gfx90a;gfx1100" \
    -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++ \
    -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 \
    -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo
  cmake --build build-hip --target ans_test ans_statistics_test \
    batch_prefix_sum_test float_test gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16

bash -c 
  export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
  cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip
  echo "=== ans_test ==="
  ./bin/ans_test
  echo "=== ans_statistics_test ==="
  ./bin/ans_statistics_test
  echo "=== batch_prefix_sum_test ==="
  ./bin/batch_prefix_sum_test
  echo "=== float_test ==="
  ./bin/float_test

bash -c 
cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src
git submodule update --init --recursive -q
cmake -S . -B /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/build-head -G Ninja \
  -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx1100 \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++ \
  -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo \
  2>&1 | tail -5
cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/build-head \
  --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test \
  gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j16 2>&1 | tail -10

bash -c 
cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src
git checkout b6e0d3f64558eb7d30cab1573be487318514c7a1 -q
cmake -S . -B /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/build-old -G Ninja \
  -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx1100 \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++ \
  -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo \
  2>&1 | tail -5
cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/build-old \
  --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test \
  gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j16 2>&1 | tail -10

bash -c 
cmake -S /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src   -B /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/dietgpu-cmp-old   -G Ninja   -DUSE_HIP=ON   -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx90a   -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++   -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5   -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo   2>&1 | tail -5 && cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/dietgpu-cmp-old   --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test   gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16 2>&1 | tail -10

bash -c 
cmake -S /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src   -B /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/dietgpu-cmp-new   -G Ninja   -DUSE_HIP=ON   -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx90a   -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++   -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5   -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo   2>&1 | tail -5 && cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/dietgpu-cmp-new   --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test   gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16 2>&1 | tail -10
